[Coffee Mate MCP Server](../../../../../index.md) / service/coffee/module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.service

# service/coffee/module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.service

> **Service Layer**

Get-a-coffee service — retrieves a single coffee by name and
registers the corresponding MCP tool.

## Remarks

Exports two symbols:

| Export                                                        | Role                                                         |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [GetACoffeeService](classes/GetACoffeeService.md)             | Effect service with `execute` and `executeFormatted` methods |
| [registerGetACoffeeTool](functions/registerGetACoffeeTool.md) | Wires the service to the MCP SDK via `registerTool`          |

The service depends on [CoffeeRepository](../../../repository/coffee-repository/classes/CoffeeRepository.md) through Effect’s DI
and fails with [CoffeeNotFoundError](../../../errors/classes/CoffeeNotFoundError.md) when no match exists.

## Classes

| Class                                             | Description                                                  |
| ------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [GetACoffeeService](classes/GetACoffeeService.md) | Effect service for retrieving a single coffee drink by name. |

## Functions

| Function                                                      | Description                                                |
| ------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| [registerGetACoffeeTool](functions/registerGetACoffeeTool.md) | Registers the `get-a-coffee` MCP tool on the given server. |
